mapper.insert: INSERT INTO captcha_codes (captcha_key, captcha_code, purpose, expires_at) VALUES ( #{captchaKey}, #{captchaCode}, #{purpose}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireMinutes} MINUTE) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, captcha_key, captcha_code, purpose, used, expires_at, created_at FROM captcha_codes WHERE captcha_key = #{captchaKey} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND used = 0 AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1
